summary: Added a clearer day-transition at the chapter opening and seeded the towels-and-laundry apartment state at the close so the handoffs from Chapter 5 and into Chapter 7 read more continuously without changing chapter beats.
edits: Changed the first sentence to mark the scene as the next evening after Chapter 5.
Expanded the closing beat so the warm towels land on the couch and the rest of the clean load is split onto the bedroom chair, matching the Chapter 7 setup.
